guest_bio: Founder of Grapevines, AI career strategist. Former Head of Product at Subziwalla (exit), Panso, and Lovingly.
episode_topic: Building Grapevines, AI career coaching, the broken job market, founder journey
audience: Founders, PMs, senior professionals in career transition
tone: Clean, high-end, minimal. Documentary feel. Respectful, not hype.
themes_to_avoid: anything that needs full episode context
